requirements.text: WHEN a configured document markdown file is added, changed, or removed, the system shall make that file update observable to connected clients with the project-relative path and event type.
WHEN the currently selected document file changes on disk, the system shall refresh the preview with fresh content while preserving the selected document route.
WHEN a non-selected configured document changes on disk while Documents View is open, the system shall refresh document tree metadata without changing the selected preview.
IF the currently selected document file is deleted, THEN the system shall show a deleted-file state instead of stale document content.
WHEN the SSE connection reconnects while Documents View is open, the system shall refresh the document tree and selected document content.
The system shall watch only document paths configured for the active project.
The system shall not introduce a project-wide markdown watcher for document updates.
The system shall exclude ticket paths from document update events to avoid duplicate ticket/document notifications.
The system shall preserve the existing one-way SSE transport model for this update.
The system shall debounce repeated file update handling for the same document path.
IF a configured document path is a single markdown file, THEN the system shall observe changes to that file.
IF a configured document path is a directory with nested markdown files, THEN the system shall observe nested markdown file changes.
IF document file changes occur while Documents View is not mounted, THEN the next Documents View load shall fetch current tree and content state.
WHEN a user saves a new document path selection, the system shall replace the active document watchers for that project before future document file updates are handled.
The system shall replace document watchers for a project without restarting ticket watchers for that project.

scenarios.title: Selected document refreshes after external edit
scenarios.given: Documents View is open with a configured document selected
scenarios.when: the selected document file changes on disk
scenarios.then: the preview shows the fresh document content without changing the selected route

scenarios.title: Non-selected document update preserves active preview
scenarios.given: Documents View is open with one document selected and another configured document visible in the tree
scenarios.when: the non-selected document changes on disk
scenarios.then: the document tree metadata refreshes and the selected preview remains unchanged

scenarios.title: Deleted selected document shows deleted state
scenarios.given: Documents View is open with a configured document selected
scenarios.when: the selected document file is deleted on disk
scenarios.then: the viewer shows a deleted-file state instead of stale content

scenarios.title: Configured document update reaches connected clients
scenarios.given: a project has configured document paths and a client is connected to live updates
scenarios.when: a markdown file inside a configured document path is added, changed, or removed
scenarios.then: the client receives an update for the project-relative document path and event type

scenarios.title: Reconnect resyncs open documents
scenarios.given: Documents View is open after the live update connection was interrupted
scenarios.then: the document tree and selected document content are refreshed

scenarios.title: Changing selected document paths enables live updates for the new paths
scenarios.given: Documents View has saved one set of selected document paths
scenarios.when: the user saves a different document path selection
scenarios.then: future file updates from the new selection are handled without requiring a server restart

obligations.title: Configured document watchers are bounded to document paths and exclude ticket paths
Document file changes invalidate cached document content before broadcasting
Document updates use a distinct document-change SSE event mapped to document:file:changed
Documents View owns mounted-route refresh behavior for selected and non-selected document updates
Selected document deletion renders a viewer-level deleted state instead of stale content
Saving document path configuration replaces project document watchers without restarting ticket watchers

testPlans.title: PathWatcherService watches only configured document paths and skips tickets
testPlans.sourceRef: Architecture Test Strategy: document watcher scope

testPlans.title: FileWatcherService invalidates document cache and broadcasts document-change
ProjectController reconfigures document watchers after saved path selection
Frontend EventBus carries typed document file change events
Documents View refreshes selected documents and reacts to path selection changes
testPlans.sourceRef: BDD scenarios: selected document refresh, deleted selected document, document path selection change
